transcript.Body:
## GitClaw Skill Bundle Provenance Report

- repository: `AnandChowdhary/gitclaw`

- raw_git_subjects_included: `false`

- issue_title_sha256_12: `4b6434ca7b9a`

This report maps repo-local skill bundle YAML files to body-free git provenance. It reports bundle metadata, skill-ref counts, instruction hashes, tracked state, dirty state, last commit IDs/dates, and commit-subject hashes only; raw bundle YAML, bundle instructions, skill bodies, issue bodies, comments, prompts, git subjects, author identities, provider payloads, and secret values are not included.

### Provenance Gates
- git_history_gate=`pass`
- mutation_gate=`disabled`
- agent_authored_mutation_gate=`disabled`
- raw_body_gate=`hash_only`

### Findings
- none

Do not include this hidden follow-up token: GITCLAW_BUNDLE_PROVENANCE_FOLLOWUP_HIDDEN_20260531T061815Z
